nodes.label: normal
nodes.description: Baseline behavior with adequate awareness, fair intent, and reasonable self-control.

nodes.label: idiot
nodes.description: Primary failure in awareness or understanding; harm is mostly caused by confusion, ignorance, or poor reasoning.

nodes.label: asshole
nodes.description: Primary failure in intent or regard for others; behavior is knowingly selfish, callous, or exploitative.

nodes.label: jackass
nodes.description: Primary failure in self-control, recklessness, or ego-driven behavior; disruptive even when not purely malicious.

nodes.label: shitbird
nodes.description: Composite of K1 + K3: low awareness plus recklessness; chaotic and disruptive without stable understanding.

nodes.label: dipshit
nodes.description: Composite of K1 + K2: poor understanding plus selfish intent; harms others while also reasoning badly.

nodes.label: fuckhead
nodes.description: Composite of K2 + K3: selfish intent plus recklessness; knowingly harmful and impulsively damaging.

nodes.label: awareness_failure
nodes.description: Deficit in understanding, foresight, or competence.

nodes.label: intent_failure
nodes.description: Deficit in fairness, regard for others, or pro-social intent.

nodes.label: control_failure
nodes.description: Deficit in self-control, prudence, or ego regulation.

dimensions.awareness_failure_score: 0-5, higher means poorer understanding or foresight
